name: ilert Alerting Platform
what_it_does: Modern alert management and on-call scheduling platform with strong automation and integration capabilities. ilert provides a REST API for managing alert sources, on-call schedules, escalation policies, and incident workflows. Integrates with monitoring tools (Prometheus, Grafana, Datadog), and supports voice, SMS, push, and Slack alerting. Strong API design makes it AI-agent-friendly for automated incident management.
use_cases: Trigger alerts from AI agent monitoring workflows when model quality degrades or agent errors exceed thresholds
Automate incident creation and routing for AI infrastructure issues using ilert's REST API
Build agent-driven alert triage workflows that acknowledge, snooze, or escalate incidents programmatically
Integrate AI agent health monitoring with on-call schedules — ensure the right person is paged when agents fail
Programmatically manage on-call rotations for AI platform teams using ilert's schedule API
not_for: Enterprise incident management with complex workflows — PagerDuty or Opsgenie have more mature enterprise features
Full ITSM integration (ServiceNow, JIRA Service Management) — ilert focuses on alerting, not ITSM workflows
Status page management — use Statuspage.io or Instatus for public-facing status communication
best_when: You want a modern, API-first alerting platform with great automation capabilities and lower cost than PagerDuty for on-call management of AI infrastructure.
avoid_when: You need PagerDuty's enterprise ecosystem integrations, compliance certifications, or are already embedded in the PagerDuty/Opsgenie ecosystem.

auth.notes: API keys with configurable permissions. Keys support read, write, and admin scopes. Used in Authorization header as Bearer token. Keys generated per team in ilert dashboard.

pricing.notes: No permanent free tier — 14-day trial available. Per-user pricing competitive with PagerDuty. Annual billing discounts available. EU-based company with transparent pricing.

performance.rate_limits: REST API: 200 requests/minute per API key

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Well-documented REST API with clear JSON error responses. API documentation includes request/response examples. Error codes are specific and actionable. Rate limit headers included in responses.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Alert creation is not idempotent — same alert can be created multiple times. Alert source deduplication keys available to prevent duplicate alerts. GET operations are fully idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Alert deduplication requires explicit deduplication key configuration — without it, same alert triggers multiple incidents
On-call schedule API returns UTC times — agents must handle timezone conversion for accurate schedule display
Escalation policy must be configured before alert sources can route incidents — verify escalation chain before creating sources
Alert resolution requires explicit API call — ilert does not auto-resolve based on monitoring tool recovery
Rate limit (200 req/min) can be hit by agents generating many alerts — implement exponential backoff
Webhook signatures should be verified — ilert signs webhooks with HMAC; agents must implement signature verification
ilert's EU data residency option separates US and EU data — configure account in appropriate region

security_score_components.security_notes: SOC2, ISO27001. HTTPS enforced. API key scopes. Webhook HMAC signing. EU data residency available. EU-based company with GDPR-first design. Strong security posture for an alerting product.
